task_description: Large set of improvements to the AniYume anime guide project: AnimeCard enhancements with filler badges, dedicated search page, top pages with new types and filters, genre page enhancements, and new /after/[slug] page

verification.summary: Build passes cleanly with all static pages generated. No test framework in this project. All new routes (after/[slug], /search, /api/top, /api/genre, /api/search/advanced) present in build output. All 6 top types generate static params. 50 after/ pages pre-generated.
